title: Design a News Feed System
input_format: User IDs wishing to fetch their feed, containing posts from friends and followed entities
output_format: A list of posts ordered by relevance or time, including post metadata
constraints: Must handle millions of users with thousands of follows. Response time under 200ms. Support media attachments and rich content. Highly available and eventually consistent.
function_signature: class NewsFeedService { getFeed(userId: string, options: FeedOptions): Post[]; publishPost(userId: string, content: string): Post; fanOut(postId: string): void; }
